entries.quote: We must have a regulatory framework for the agentic (world) and once that's there, we can look at the orderly kind of implementation of use cases. As a country, we must have an open mind and allow some experimentation, the creation of use cases using the agentic (technologies) because it creates a leverage for the user and merchant.
entries.signal: NPCI chief calling for RBI/regulatory guardrails around AI-driven payments systems; signals openness to innovation within controlled framework—relevant for Scapia's fintech strategy and credit-on-UPI expansion.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes AI-driven agents in payments require regulatory sandboxing; NPCI is actively building agentic use cases (FiMI language model reaching 1M monthly users) and seeking regulatory clarity to scale responsibly.

entries.quote: We must have a regulatory framework for the agentic (world) and once that's there, we can look at the orderly kind of implementation of use cases
entries.signal: NPCI actively pursuing AI-driven transaction automation and agent-to-agent banking flows—pushing regulators to enable faster fintech integration at scale
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes agentic AI will drive next-phase UPI growth; sees regulatory clarity as enabler, not blocker
